data.requirement: Integrate player performance data using match_id and player identifiers (ensure alignment between 'player_name' in stats tables and 'player' in detailed_data)
data.reason: Original requirement failed to address key mismatch between 'player_name' and 'player' fields across tables, which would prevent successful joins.

data.requirement: Calculate a normalized 'performance impact score' combining runs/strike_rate (batters) or wickets/economy_rate (bowlers) with player_of_match_awards frequency
data.reason: Original opponent strength weighting was unfeasible due to missing opponent quality metrics. Simplified formula aligns with available data.

visualization.requirement: Remove team-level chart; replace with faceted bar charts showing individual players' match-winning metrics distribution
visualization.reason: Team-level visualization contradicts the individual performance analysis goal and uses unaggregated player-level data improperly

visualization.requirement: Replace venue-type heatmap with spatial heatmap of venues using geolocation data from match_summary.city
visualization.reason: Original venue binning requires external categorization data not present in schema. Geographic analysis is more feasible.

interaction.requirement: Adjust slider to control weights of valid metrics (runs/wickets, strike/economy rates, awards) in performance impact score
interaction.reason: Original implementation depended on unavailable opponent strength data. Revised version uses actually available metrics.
